title: Dye the Skies (Dye Depot x Create Aeronautics)
description: This resource pack currently adds dye depot support to the hot air envelopes from Create Aeronautics, with more blocks planned for the future!
body:
Have you ever felt that dye depot should work with Create Aeronautics?

Well now it does!!!

Please keep in mind this is my very first resource pack, so if things are a little rough around the edges thats why.
